a: strict I2V: 픽셀 단위 첫 프레임 고정 (참조형 금지)
b1: strict I2V + start_image/end_image 동시 입력 (Seedance 계열 등 — 선행 스크리닝 §4-가에서 확정)
b2_beta: 시트 통째 입력 해석 가능 모델 — 오작동 여부만 기록, 판정 제외 (blueprint-b2 v2)
c: b1과 동일 + 순차 실행 (체인 샷은 앞 클립 완료 후 시작 프레임 제작)
r: b1과 동일 (원본 프레임 직접 입력 — 상한선)

common.bible: Continuity bible (LOCKED): the same young woman in every shot — black lip-length bob with wispy bangs, layered silver charm choker, pale blue satin slip dress with white daisy lace trim; wardrobe and hairstyle never change. Location: retro pastel public restroom — mint-green tiles, orange-red round sinks on a mint counter, large round mirrors with vertical tube lights. Light: warm fluorescent from above the mirrors, constant, same time of day. She stays on the same side of the 180-degree line, facing the mirror wall. Signature props: small lip-gloss wand; chrome drain.
common.negative: Never: any camera movement beyond what is specified, wardrobe or hairstyle change, shadow direction flip, day/night jump, extra people, duplicate faces, plastic skin, morphing hands, on-screen text, watermark.
common.seed_policy: 가능한 모델이면 시드 고정 (시리즈 일관성, design.md §8-3)

beta.label: B2β — 시트 통째 입력 (원안, 1회 시도·판정 제외)
beta.per_shot_prompt: Follow row "SHOT N" of the reference sheet exactly: start from the left image, end at the right image, duration and camera as written. Do not show the sheet itself.
beta.full_prompt: Create the full sequence: each row is one shot, in order, with the written durations. Cut between shots. Do not show the sheet itself.

chain.note: 시작 프레임은 사전 생성 불가 — 앞 샷 클립의 실제 마지막 프레임에서 영상 단계에 만든다.
steps: 편집 모델(openai/gpt-image-2/edit)에 [추출 프레임, 캐릭터 정본] + chain_prompt → 이 샷의 시작 프레임
chain.chain_prompt: Continue this exact moment: the same woman, same wand position at her lips, but seen from a left side profile at the counter. Same lighting, same room.
